title: Tiles Gallery
subtitle: Interactive Product Showcase
description: A modern tile gallery web application built with Next.js featuring responsive layouts, smooth UI animations, category-based product browsing, and an engaging user experience focused on performance and clean design.
challenges: Implementing responsive gallery layouts with smooth animations, optimizing component rendering in Next.js, and maintaining visual consistency across different devices and screen sizes.
improvements: Future improvements include backend integration for dynamic product management, advanced filtering and search functionality, authentication systems, and interactive product detail pages.

title: KeenKeeper
subtitle: Task & Productivity Tracker
description: A responsive productivity and task management application designed to help users organize daily activities, manage tasks efficiently, and improve workflow through a clean and interactive interface.
challenges: Managing application state efficiently while ensuring persistent task data storage and maintaining a responsive user experience across desktop and mobile devices.
improvements: Future plans include drag-and-drop task management, authentication features, cloud synchronization, calendar integration, and dark/light mode support.

title: DigiTools
subtitle: Digital Resource Hub
description: A centralized digital tools platform providing users with quick access to useful web utilities through a clean, responsive, and user-friendly interface focused on simplicity and accessibility.
challenges: Designing a scalable and visually consistent interface while organizing multiple utility components in a clean and accessible layout.
improvements: Future updates include adding more advanced digital utilities, Progressive Web App (PWA) support, theme customization, and performance optimization for faster loading.
